title: pyrola rotundifolia subsp. grandiflora
intro: Pyrola rotundifolia subsp. grandiflora, also known as wintergreen, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant contains methyl salicylate, a compound that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for relieving pain and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of wintergreen include its ability to ease muscle and joint pain, reduce fever, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Wintergreen is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
